title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF BINUANGAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ALICIA, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL SUR, TO BELLA.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3268 / 57 OG No. 7, 1194 (February 13, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2805, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF BINUANGAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ALICIA, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL SUR, TO BELLA.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress asssembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the barrio of Binua√±gan in the Municipality of Alicia, Province of Zamboanga del Sur, is changed to Bella.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
